request.prompt:
Determine whether MONSTA X has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.title: MONSTA X - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule
MONSTA X Tickets, 2026-2027 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
Monsta X 'THE X : NEXUS' 2026 World Tour North America Dates
MONSTA X | KPOP Concerts | Infosys Theater at MSG
2026 MONSTA X World Tour 'The X : Nexus' | Kpop Wiki | Fandom
2026 monsta x world tour [the x : nexus] in rosemont
Monsta X THE X : NEXUS Tour 2026 | North America Dates & Tickets
MONSTA X Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.
monsta x 2026 world tour [the x : nexus] in north america
MONSTA X WORLDWIDE - Official Fan Page
2026 MONSTA X WORLD TOUR [THE X : NEXUS] – Ticketmaster Help
Fan Meet Up in Shanghai Monsta X 2026
MONSTA X | KPOP Concerts | Infosys Theater at MSG
MONSTA X Schedule Calendar | Music Shows, Concerts, Fan Meetings | CHOEAEDOL
MONSTA X discusses future fan content during livestream | allkpop

citations.cited_text: Following the release of a landmark third English album on Friday (April 3), Monsta X is now expanding their new world tour to North America. Billboar...
citations.title: Monsta X 'THE X : NEXUS' 2026 World Tour North America Dates

content.text: Following the release of a new English album, MONSTA X announced 10 new North American stops added to their ongoing 2026 world tour, THE X : NEXUS, across the United States and Canada
, all confirmed by Ticketmaster, Live Nation, MSG venue, and Billboard.
